---
title: "Electives"
format: 
   html:
     include-in-header: 
        text: |
          <style>
          #title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title .title {
          color: #304830;
          }
          </style>
freeze: auto
listing: 
  contents: electives # all Quarto docs in the `assignments` directory will be included on your listing page
  type: table # or `default` or `table`; each type has its own set of yaml options to include
  fields: [title, date] # only display title and description
  sort: "date" # can also sort on more than one field
  categories: true # allows you to sort posts by assigned categories 
  field-display-names: 
    date: "Due date"
---
